message:
fix: return errors from json.Unmarshal in UnmarshalSettings instead of swallowing them

Malformed JSON in hooks, editorMode, or enabledPlugins fields was
silently ignored, leaving those fields as zero values. This could
silently erase hook configurations including security guards. Now
returns a descriptive error for any unmarshal failure.

Fixes gt-7hf4a

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
